name: gitgrit
description: Project-aware DevOps compliance enforcement for GitGrit-connected repositories. Resolves the current repo to a GitGrit project at session start and calls validate_edit on the server before every Edit or Write so introduced violations are attributed correctly and pre-existing ones don't block the edit.

api_url.title: GitGrit MCP URL
api_url.description: MCP endpoint. Override only for self-hosted deployments.
